entry.title: FiôÙnally, I got my PhôÙD
entry.content:
ComôÙpletôÙing a PhôÙD has been a chalôÙlengôÙing yet reôÙwardôÙing jourôÙney. In this blog post, I will share the key stages of my fiôÙnal phase.

Oral ExôÙamôÙiôÙnaôÙtion (Midã-ãSepôÙtemôÙber):

ConôÙsistôÙing of a 40ã-ãminute conôÙcise preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtion and a 90ã-ãminute quesôÙtionã-ãandã-ãanôÙswer sesôÙsion, the viva proôÙvided an enôÙlightôÙenôÙing exôÙpeôÙriôÙence that enôÙriched my unôÙderôÙstandôÙing of the topic.

MiôÙnor ReôÙviôÙsion (SubôÙmitôÙted in midã-ãOcôÙtoôÙber):

FolôÙlowôÙing the viva, a miôÙnor modôÙiôÙfiôÙcaôÙtion process was unôÙderôÙtaken. I reôÙfined my paôÙper based on conôÙstrucôÙtive feedôÙback to enôÙsure it met the acaôÙdôÙeôÙmic stanôÙdards.

FiôÙnal SubôÙmisôÙsion (DeôÙcemôÙber):

AfôÙter a proôÙlonged wait for deôÙfense comôÙmitôÙtee and facôÙulty reôÙview, the jourôÙney culôÙmiôÙnated in the fiôÙnal subôÙmisôÙsion, markôÙing the end of my PhôÙD caôÙreer.

AfôÙter sevôÙeral years, the jourôÙney fiôÙnally came to an end. I reôÙcently came across this senôÙtence:

Not everyôÙone is caôÙpaôÙble of doôÙing a PhôÙD."

Sad but true.

entry.title: Joint preôÙdicôÙtion of pedesôÙtriôÙans and ocôÙcuôÙpancy grid map
entry.content:
PreôÙdicôÙtions about maps can aid in the comôÙpuôÙtaôÙtion of inôÙforôÙmaôÙtion gain in auôÙtonomous exôÙploôÙration tasks, thereby imôÙprovôÙing exôÙploôÙration efôÙfiôÙciency. VarôÙiôÙous studôÙies have highôÙlighted the favourable inôÙfluôÙence of preôÙcise map preôÙdicôÙtion on the efôÙfecôÙtiveôÙness of auôÙtonomous exôÙploôÙration tasks.

This proôÙject aims to deôÙvelop a comôÙpreôÙhenôÙsive frameôÙwork that comôÙbines map preôÙdicôÙtion and pedesôÙtrian trackôÙing, foôÙcusôÙing on the inôÙterôÙacôÙtion beôÙtween pedesôÙtriôÙans and the enôÙviôÙronôÙment to imôÙprove perôÙforôÙmance in preôÙdictôÙing both map and pedesôÙtrian beôÙhavôÙiours. The joint esôÙtiôÙmaôÙtion process folôÙlows an itôÙerôÙaôÙtive apôÙproach. The inôÙteôÙgraôÙtion of an arôÙtiôÙfiôÙcial poôÙtenôÙtial field guides pedesôÙtrian moôÙtion based on the preôÙdicted map, thus imôÙprovôÙing the acôÙcuôÙracy of pedesôÙtrian trackôÙing. ConôÙversely, the preôÙdicted crowd field, deôÙrived from pedesôÙtrian trackôÙing and preôÙdicôÙtion, reôÙfines the map preôÙdicôÙtion process by utiôÙlizôÙing imôÙage segôÙmenôÙtaôÙtion alôÙgoôÙrithms.

One key asôÙpect of our apôÙproach is the inôÙcluôÙsion of a feedôÙback loop in the joint esôÙtiôÙmaôÙtion sysôÙtem, alôÙlowôÙing for conôÙtinôÙuôÙous reôÙfineôÙment and imôÙproveôÙment of both the map preôÙdicôÙtion and pedesôÙtrian trackôÙing comôÙpoôÙnents. Through itôÙerôÙaôÙtive upôÙdates and enôÙhanceôÙments based on the recôÙiôÙpôÙroôÙcal reôÙlaôÙtionôÙship beôÙtween pedesôÙtriôÙans and the enôÙviôÙronôÙment, our alôÙgoôÙrithm achieves inôÙcreased acôÙcuôÙracy in preôÙdictôÙing varôÙiôÙous asôÙpects, inôÙcludôÙing the shape and size of the map and the traôÙjecôÙtoôÙries of pedesôÙtriôÙans.

The inôÙcorôÙpoôÙraôÙtion of map preôÙdicôÙtion and pedesôÙtrian trackôÙing in our joint esôÙtiôÙmaôÙtion frameôÙwork sigôÙniôÙfies a subôÙstanôÙtial breakôÙthrough in auôÙtonomous roôÙbot exôÙploôÙration. By utiôÙlizôÙing the inôÙterôÙplay beôÙtween pedesôÙtriôÙans and the enôÙviôÙronôÙment, our alôÙgoôÙrithm exôÙhibits favourable outôÙcomes in terms of enôÙhanced preôÙdicôÙtion acôÙcuôÙracy and roôÙbustôÙness. This frameôÙwork has the poôÙtenôÙtial to faôÙcilôÙiôÙtate more efôÙfiôÙcient and efôÙfecôÙtive exôÙploôÙration in inôÙtriôÙcate enôÙviôÙronôÙments, thus adôÙvancôÙing the caôÙpaôÙbilôÙiôÙties of auôÙtonomous moôÙbile roôÙbots in diôÙverse realã-ãworld sceôÙnarôÙios.

entry.title: GuiôÙtar colôÙlecôÙtion, part 3
entry.content:
CurôÙrent ElecôÙtric guiôÙtars

Fender Eric ClapôÙton StraôÙtoôÙcaster

First of all, withôÙout disôÙcussing the CS or Lace SenôÙsor verôÙsions, letãs foôÙcus on this budôÙgetã-ãfriendly verôÙsion. The Tokai TLBã-ã180, brand new and unôÙboxed, is priced at 17,000 HKD, disôÙcounted to 12,900 HKD. SigôÙnaôÙture modôÙels usuôÙally donãt parôÙticôÙiôÙpate in disôÙcount acôÙtivôÙiôÙties, comôÙmonly priced at 85% of the regôÙuôÙlar price, while disôÙplay modôÙels seem to be at 80%.
ÕÎÍÒˆˆÿ¥ð¡Ò´Ò¨CSÿ¥ÌÒLaceÌƒÕ°Í´ÓÌ˜ÿ¥ÍÕÒ´£ÕÍð¿ð¡ÓÐÕÍˋÍ´Ì¯ÕÓÛÝÿ¥Ì´Í¿17kÿ¥ÌÍƒ12900Ì¡₤Í¿Èÿ¥Ó¯§ÍÌ˜ƒð¡Ò˜ÍƒÍ¯ÌÍÒÌÌÌÇ£Íÿ¥ÌÛÕÌ´Í¿85Ìÿ¥Õ°ÍÍÍË§ÍÌ₤8ÌÐ

Letãs start with the drawôÙbacks:

  1. the vinôÙtageã-ãstyle tone knob isôÙnãt very staôÙble, the sinôÙgleã-ãply pickôÙguard is prone to deôÙforôÙmaôÙtion, and getôÙting used to the finer threads may take some time.
    ÍÒˆˆÓ¥¤Õ£ÿ¥ÍƒˋÍÊÒˆ¢Õ°ÌÕð¡ÍÊ ÓˋˋÍÛÿ¥ÍÛÍÝÊÒÙñÌ¢ÍÛ¿ÌÒÛÍ§Âÿ¥ÓÇ¯Í¯ÍÓçýÕÒÎÕÌ¯Ó¢ÌÈÐ

  2. Pay atôÙtenôÙtion to the deôÙtails; the Soft Vã-ãshaped neck is not much difôÙferôÙent from a regôÙuôÙlar C, suitôÙable for a rockã-ãstyle grip, and it ofôÙfers very comôÙfortôÙable supôÙport. The neck isôÙnãt glossy, which is great as it doesôÙnãt get sticky!
    ÕÒÎÓÌÓÓÇ¯Ó₤ÿ¥soft VÓÇÕ ¡ÒÌÛÕCÍñÛÍËð¡ÍÊÏÿ¥ÕˋÍÌÌ£ƒÌÍÿ¥Ì₤ÌÕÍ¡¡ÒÌÿ¥ÓÇÕ ¡ð¡Ì₤ÍÌ¥ÿ¥ð¡ÓýÌÕð¡Õ£ÕÍ¡¡ÍË§ÿ¥

  3. Key point!!! The cirôÙcuit is very verôÙsaôÙtile, and many peoôÙple who find the sound not to their likôÙing might not be usôÙing its cirôÙcuit propôÙerly!
    ÕÕ£ÿ¥ÿ¥ÿ¥ÿ¥ÿ¥ÿ¥Õ£Òñ₤ÕÍ¡¡ÒÝÍ₤ÿ¥ÍƒÍÊð¤¤ÒÎ¤ÍƒÒýÕ°ð¡ÍË§Ò§Ì₤ð¡Ìð§¢Ó´ÍÛÓÕ£Òñ₤ÿ¥

Three knobs: the first one is VolôÙume, the secôÙond is Tone, and the third is Boost. If you set all three knobs to 10 when you pick it up, youãre doôÙing it wrong.
ð¡ÍÌÕÿ¥Ó˜˜ð¡ÍÌ₤Õ°ÕVolôÙumeÿ¥Ó˜˜ð¤ÍÕ°ÒýToneÿ¥Ó˜˜ð¡ÍÌ₤Ì¢ÍçBoostÐÍÍÎÓÑð§ ð¡ÌÌð¡ÍÌÕÍ´ÌÍ¯10Í¯ÝÕ₤ð¤Ð

  • VolôÙume: At 10, it has a boost of about 10ã-ã12db comôÙpared to a regôÙuôÙlar Strat, usuôÙally used around 7 to match a regôÙuôÙlar Strat.
    VolôÙumeÿ¥10ÓÌÍÓ¡Ì₤Ì¥ÌÛÕstratÍÊÏÌÎÌ10ã-ã12dbÓBoostÿ¥ð¡Ò˜ð§¢Ó´Í´7ÍñÎÍ°ÒÌÛÕStratÓ¡Íÿ¥

  • Tone: It has a TBX knob, genôÙerôÙally set at 5, equivôÙaôÙlent to 10 on a regôÙuôÙlar Strat, 0ã-ã5 is the same as a regôÙuôÙlar Stratãs tone knob, and 5ã-ã10 can inôÙcrease the high tones.
    Toneÿ¥TBXÌÕÿ¥ð¡Ò˜ð§¢Ó´Í´5ÿ¥ÒÌÛÕstratÓ10Ó¡Íÿ¥0ã-ã5ÒÌÛÕstratÕ°ÒýÌÕÓ¡Íÿ¥5ã-ã10Í₤ð£ËÍÂÍ Õ¨Õ°ÿ¥

  • Boost: At 0, itãs the same as a regôÙuôÙlar Strat, inôÙcreasôÙing the midã-ãfreôÙquency gain by about 12db from 0 to 10.
    Boostÿ¥0ÒÌÛÕstratÓ¡Íÿ¥0ã-ã10ÍÂÍ ð¡ÙÕ £ÍÂÓÍÊÏÌÎÌ12dbÍñÎÍ°Ð

So, to get a norôÙmal Strat sound, set VolôÙume to 7, Tone to 5, and Boost to 0.
To get close to a fat humôÙbucker tone, set Boost to 10, Tone to 5, and adôÙjust VolôÙume acôÙcordôÙingly.
Ìð£Ëÿ¥Ì°ÒÎÓýÍƒÌÙÈÍ¡¡StratÒýÕ°ÿ¥ÕÒÎVolôÙume 7ÿ¥Tone 5ÿ¥Boost 0Ð
Ì°ÒÎÌËÒ¢ÕÓñÍÒËÍÕ°Òýÿ¥Boost 10ÿ¥Tone 5ÿ¥VolôÙumeÒˆÒÀÒˆ¢ÌÇÐ

By usôÙing these knobs in comôÙbiôÙnaôÙtion, you can achieve a wide range of outôÙput comôÙbiôÙnaôÙtions. For exôÙamôÙple, if you want a solo, you can pull up the Boost and set Tone to 10, achievôÙing a sound simôÙiôÙlar to a Strat afôÙter a light overôÙdrive.
ÕÍ¿ƒÍÌÕÕÍð§¢Ó´ÿ¥Í₤ð£ËÍƒÍ¯ÕÍ¡¡ÍÊÓÒ¥¡Í¤ÓçÍÐÌ₤ÍÎÿ¥Ì°ÒÎsoloÓÌÍÿ¥Í₤ð£Ëð¡Ó´Ò¡ˋÕÀÍÊÒ¡Ì¢ÿ¥ÌBoostÌÒçñðƒÿ¥Toneð¿ÌÍ¯10ÿ¥Í₤ð£ËÍƒÍ¯ÕÀð¥¥Ì¥ÕÕð¤Ò¥ÕÒ¥ÍƒÓStratÕ°ÒýÐ

Charvel DK24 SuôÙper StraôÙtoôÙcaster

AmôÙpliôÙfiers

Supro Delta King 10

### Yamaha THR10

entry.title: EfôÙfiôÙcient exôÙploôÙration in crowds by couôÙpling navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion conôÙtroller and exôÙploôÙration PlanôÙner
entry.content:
Overview

AuôÙtonomous exôÙploôÙration in scenes with movôÙing pedesôÙtriôÙans is critôÙiôÙcal for deôÙployôÙing auôÙtonomous moôÙbile roôÙbots in popôÙuôÙlated places such as malls, airôÙports, and muôÙseôÙums. The exôÙisôÙtence of dyôÙnamic obôÙstaôÙcles poses chalôÙlenges on achievôÙing an efôÙfiôÙcient, safe, and roôÙbust exôÙploôÙration sysôÙtem: the roôÙbot may get stuck in the pedesôÙtriôÙans withôÙout makôÙing progress in scene covôÙerôÙage; it may colôÙlide with huôÙmans and hurt them; the huôÙmanã-ãroôÙbot colôÙliôÙsion will fail the exôÙploôÙration process or cause large drift and arôÙtiôÙfacts in siôÙmulôÙtaôÙneôÙous loôÙcalôÙizaôÙtion and mapôÙping (SLAM). In this work, we proôÙpose a frameôÙwork that can solve these chalôÙlenges by tightly couôÙpling a reôÙinôÙforceôÙment learned navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion conôÙtroller and a hiôÙerôÙarôÙchiôÙcal exôÙploôÙration planôÙner enôÙhanced with a reôÙcovôÙery planôÙner. The navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion conôÙtroller proôÙvides a value funcôÙtion deôÙscribôÙing the disôÙtriôÙbôÙuôÙtion of crowds around the roôÙbot, which will be leverôÙaged by exôÙploôÙration planôÙner and reôÙcovôÙery planôÙner to minôÙiôÙmize the huôÙmanã-ãroôÙbot inôÙterôÙrupôÙtions. We evalôÙuôÙate the proôÙposed exôÙploôÙration frameôÙwork against sevôÙeral methôÙods on a set of inôÙdoor benchôÙmarks with pedesôÙtriôÙans, verôÙiôÙfyôÙing the adôÙvanôÙtages of our method in terms of exôÙploôÙration efôÙfiôÙciency, navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion safety, and SLAM qualôÙity.

entry.title: A hiôÙerôÙarôÙchiôÙcal apôÙproach for moôÙbile roôÙbot exôÙploôÙration in pedesôÙtrian crowd
entry.content:
Overview

AuôÙtonomous exôÙploôÙration is a funôÙdaôÙmenôÙtal task for moôÙbile roôÙbots. HowôÙever, a maôÙjor limôÙiôÙtaôÙtion is that in pracôÙtiôÙcal apôÙpliôÙcaôÙtions, roôÙbots usuôÙally face dyôÙnamic obôÙstaôÙcles such as pedesôÙtrian crowds. These dyôÙnamic obôÙjects creôÙate sigôÙnifôÙiôÙcant chalôÙlenges for both colôÙliôÙsionã-ãfree navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion and acôÙcuôÙrate loôÙcalôÙizaôÙtion/ãmapôÙping, which can comôÙproôÙmise the safety and exôÙploôÙration perôÙforôÙmance of the roôÙbot. In this work, a hiôÙerôÙarôÙchiôÙcal apôÙproach is proôÙposed for both efôÙfecôÙtive exôÙploôÙration and colôÙliôÙsionã-ãfree navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion in crowded enôÙviôÙronôÙments. The cenôÙtral idea of our apôÙproach is to comôÙbine loôÙcal and global inôÙforôÙmaôÙtion to enôÙsure the safety and efôÙfiôÙciency of the exôÙploôÙration planôÙner. BeôÙsides, our planôÙning method utiôÙlizes a reôÙinôÙforceôÙment learnôÙing (RL)-based obôÙstaôÙcle avoidôÙance alôÙgoôÙrithm that alôÙlows the roôÙbot to safely folôÙlow the exôÙploôÙration planôÙnerãs path through the pedesôÙtrian crowd. The proôÙposed sysôÙtem is thorôÙoughly evalôÙuôÙated in simôÙuôÙlaôÙtion enôÙviôÙronôÙments, and the reôÙsults show that it outôÙperôÙforms exôÙistôÙing methôÙods in terms of not only the exôÙploôÙration efôÙfiôÙciency but also the loôÙcalôÙizaôÙtion and mapôÙping acôÙcuôÙracy.

ExôÙploôÙration PlanôÙner

A hiôÙerôÙarôÙchiôÙcal auôÙtonomous exôÙploôÙration planôÙner is deôÙsigned to deôÙterôÙmine an exôÙploôÙration tour with a Travelã-ãSalesôÙmanã-ãProbôÙlem (TSP)-based planôÙner on the global map and to reôÙfine the exôÙploôÙration path with the Nextã-ãBestã-ãView (NBV)-based planôÙner on loôÙcal maps and, reôÙspecôÙtively. Left: the global planôÙner proôÙvides an orôÙder to visit difôÙferôÙent unôÙexôÙplored reôÙgions (blue points and lines) and deôÙterôÙmines a rough global goal for the nextã-ãstep exôÙploôÙration; Right: the loôÙcal planôÙner seôÙlects a preôÙcise viewôÙpoint (orôÙange point) as the inôÙterôÙmeôÙdiôÙate goal and the RLã-ãbased moôÙtion planôÙner deôÙterôÙmines veôÙlocôÙity comôÙmand (red arôÙrow) to achieve the inôÙterôÙmeôÙdiôÙate goal.

The ArôÙchiôÙtecôÙture of the RLã-ãbased NavôÙiôÙgaôÙtion Neural NetôÙwork.

Based on the opôÙtiôÙmized hiôÙerôÙarôÙchiôÙcal exôÙploôÙration stratôÙegy, an RLã-ãbased colôÙliôÙsion avoidôÙance alôÙgoôÙrithm is emôÙbedôÙded to enôÙsure the roôÙbot exôÙeôÙcutes the navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion task safely and efôÙfiôÙciently through the crowd. Our colôÙliôÙsion avoidôÙance conôÙtroller also imôÙplicôÙitly modôÙels the crowd flow disôÙtriôÙbôÙuôÙtion loôÙcally around the roôÙbot to minôÙiôÙmize the inôÙterã-ãinôÙterôÙrupôÙtion beôÙtween the roôÙbot and the crowd, which not only imôÙproves the exôÙploôÙration efôÙfiôÙciency but also inôÙcreases the sucôÙcess rate and acôÙcuôÙracy in both mapôÙping and loôÙcalôÙizaôÙtion.

The netôÙwork takes the laser scans , the relôÙaôÙtive poôÙsiôÙtion and the roôÙbotãs curôÙrent veôÙlocôÙity as inôÙputs. And the acôÙtion is samôÙpled from a GaussôÙian disôÙtriôÙbôÙuôÙtion conôÙstructed by the mean with a log stanôÙdard deôÙviôÙaôÙtion vecôÙtor .

The proôÙposed sysôÙtem is thorôÙoughly evalôÙuôÙated in an exôÙtenôÙsive simôÙuôÙlaôÙtion exôÙperôÙiôÙment, where the imôÙpact of difôÙferôÙent planôÙning and navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion methôÙods for navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion in crowds is inôÙvesôÙtiôÙgated.

entry.title: OcôÙcuôÙpancy grid map preôÙdicôÙtion for moôÙbile roôÙbots
entry.content:
Fast, colôÙliôÙsionã-ãfree moveôÙment in an unôÙseen enôÙviôÙronôÙment reôÙmains a chalôÙlenge for moôÙbile roôÙbot sysôÙtems. The roôÙbotãs abilôÙity to reaôÙson about its fuôÙture moôÙtion is ofôÙten limôÙited by the senôÙsorãs Field of View (FOV). In conôÙtrast, biôÙoôÙlogôÙiôÙcal sysôÙtems usuôÙally preôÙdict the fuôÙture unôÙobôÙserved based on preôÙviôÙous exôÙpeôÙriôÙence by conôÙsidôÙerôÙing what might exôÙist outôÙside of the curôÙrent obôÙserôÙvaôÙtion.

The OcôÙcuôÙpancy Grid Map (OGM) genôÙerôÙated by the siôÙmulôÙtaôÙneôÙous loôÙcalôÙizaôÙtion and mapôÙping (SLAM) alôÙgoôÙrithm usôÙing the laser scan senôÙsor is widely used in both moôÙbile roôÙbots and unôÙmanned veôÙhiôÙcles. An OGM diôÙvides the space around the roôÙbot into cells repôÙreôÙsentôÙing the state of the enôÙviôÙronôÙment, i.e., free, ocôÙcuôÙpied, or unôÙknown. VarôÙiôÙous methôÙods have been proôÙposed for the preôÙdicôÙtion of OGMs, which are enôÙcoded as imôÙages. Some work foôÙcuses on the esôÙtiôÙmaôÙtion and preôÙdicôÙtion of the traôÙjecôÙtory of movôÙing obôÙjects in OGM, while othôÙers conôÙcenôÙtrate on the strucôÙture of the enôÙviôÙronôÙment. In one study, the auôÙthor uses sevôÙeral deep learnôÙingã-ãbased methôÙods, such as UNet and GenôÙerôÙaôÙtive adôÙverôÙsarôÙial netôÙwork (GAN), to preôÙdict the exôÙpanded OGM. In anôÙother study, VariôÙaôÙtional AuôÙtoenôÙcoders (VAE) are apôÙplied to preôÙdict the strucôÙture of some unôÙmapped reôÙgions.

In this proôÙject, we foôÙcus on a dataã-ãdriôÙven apôÙproach that does not rely on exôÙplicit asôÙsumpôÙtions about the enôÙviôÙronôÙment but inôÙstead learns regôÙuôÙlarôÙiôÙties from exôÙamôÙples. SpecifôÙiôÙcally, inôÙspired by preôÙviôÙous work, we emôÙploy UNet, VAE, and GAN to preôÙdict unôÙknown map reôÙgions beôÙyond fronôÙtiers. AlôÙthough this proôÙject uses a netôÙwork strucôÙture simôÙiôÙlar to preôÙviôÙous studôÙies, we have adopted a difôÙferôÙent enôÙcodôÙing method for OGMs into traôÙversôÙaôÙble and unôÙtraôÙversôÙaôÙble cells.

The work conôÙcerned in this proôÙject is listed as folôÙlows:

We colôÙlected datasets for the deep learnôÙingã-ãbased OGM preôÙdicôÙtion task and preôÙprocessed the data for netôÙwork trainôÙing.
We imôÙpleôÙmented sevôÙeral difôÙferôÙent OGM preôÙdicôÙtion netôÙworks, inôÙcludôÙing UNet, VAE, and GAN.
We trained and tested the above three netôÙworks and comôÙpared their perôÙforôÙmance on the OGM preôÙdicôÙtion task.

entry.title: Bought a new Charvel suôÙperã-ãstraôÙtoôÙcaster
Multiã-ãscale guided mask reôÙfineôÙment for RGBã-ãD perôÙcepôÙtion
entry.content:
Pixelã-ãlevel obôÙject segôÙmenôÙtaôÙtion is highly deôÙsired in roôÙbot perôÙcepôÙtion sysôÙtems due to its imôÙporôÙtance for many viôÙsion apôÙpliôÙcaôÙtions. ExôÙistôÙing apôÙproaches for pixelã-ãlevel segôÙmenôÙtaôÙtion are mainly based on deep neuôÙtral netôÙworks (DNN), which can achieve high acôÙcuôÙracy in genôÙerôÙatôÙing the seôÙmanôÙtic masks. HowôÙever, they still have difôÙfiôÙculôÙties in beôÙing apôÙplied to roôÙbot viôÙsion due to the large reôÙquireôÙments of storôÙage and comôÙputôÙing reôÙsources. MoôÙtiôÙvated by the reôÙcent works on utiôÙlizôÙing depth cues and edgeã-ãpreôÙservôÙing comôÙpoôÙnents for more acôÙcuôÙrate segôÙmenôÙtaôÙtions.


In this paôÙper, we proôÙpose to imôÙiôÙtate the DNN arôÙchiôÙtecôÙture usôÙing lightã-ãweight comôÙpoôÙnents and deôÙsign a multiã-ãscale guided mask reôÙfineôÙment method to enôÙhance the coarse segôÙmenôÙtaôÙtions to fineã-ãscale ones. TakôÙing foreôÙground segôÙmenôÙtaôÙtion and temôÙpoôÙral obôÙject segôÙmenôÙtaôÙtion as two repôÙreôÙsenôÙtaôÙtive apôÙpliôÙcaôÙtions, we quanôÙtiôÙtaôÙtively evalôÙuôÙate the proôÙposed method on benchôÙmark datasets. It is demonôÙstrated in the exôÙperôÙiôÙmenôÙtal reôÙsults that our method can achieve not only sigôÙnifôÙiôÙcant acôÙcuôÙracy imôÙprove- ments comôÙpared to other alôÙterôÙnaôÙtives, but also the suôÙpeôÙrior edgeã-ãpreôÙservôÙing caôÙpaôÙbilôÙity with limôÙited storôÙing and comôÙputôÙing reôÙsources. We beôÙlieve that our method is feaôÙsiôÙble for realã-ãtime pixelã-ãlevel perôÙcepôÙtion on roôÙbotic sysôÙtems due to its scalôÙable imôÙpleôÙmenôÙtaôÙtion and small reôÙsource reôÙquireôÙments.

This proôÙject have be pubôÙlished on SPL.

entry.title: Realã-ãtime dense viôÙsual inôÙerôÙtial SLAM sysôÙtem
entry.content:
Overview

Dense mapôÙping is alôÙways the deôÙsire of siôÙmulôÙtaôÙneôÙous loôÙcalôÙizaôÙtion and mapôÙping (SLAM), esôÙpeôÙcially for the apôÙpliôÙcaôÙtions that reôÙquire fast and dense scene inôÙforôÙmaôÙtion. ViôÙsualã-ãinôÙerôÙtial odomôÙeôÙtry (VIO) is a lightã-ãweight and efôÙfecôÙtive soôÙluôÙtion to fast selfã-ãloôÙcalôÙizaôÙtion. HowôÙever, VIOã-ãbased SLAM sysôÙtems have difôÙfiôÙculty in proôÙvidôÙing dense mapôÙping reôÙsults due to the spaôÙtial sparôÙsity and temôÙpoôÙral inôÙstaôÙbilôÙity of the VIO depth esôÙtiôÙmaôÙtions. AlôÙthough there have been great efôÙforts on realã-ãtime mapôÙping and depth reôÙcovôÙery from sparse meaôÙsureôÙments, the exôÙistôÙing soôÙluôÙtions for VIOã-ãbased SLAM still fail to preôÙserve sufôÙfiôÙcient geomôÙeôÙtry deôÙtails in their reôÙsults.

Method

In this paôÙper, we proôÙpose to emôÙbed depth reôÙcovôÙery into VIOã-ãbased SLAM for realã-ãtime dense mapôÙping. In the proôÙposed method, we preôÙsent a subôÙspaceã-ãbased staôÙbiôÙlizaôÙtion scheme to mainôÙtain the temôÙpoôÙral conôÙsisôÙtency and deôÙsign a hiôÙerôÙarôÙchiôÙcal pipeline for edgeã-ãpreôÙservôÙing depth inôÙterôÙpoôÙlaôÙtion to reôÙduce the comôÙpuôÙtaôÙtional burôÙden.

ReôÙsult

NuôÙmerôÙous exôÙperôÙiôÙments demonôÙstrate that our method can achieve an acôÙcuôÙracy imôÙproveôÙment of up to 49.1 cm comôÙpared to stateã-ãofã-ãtheã-ãart learnôÙingã-ãbased methôÙods for depth reôÙcovôÙery and reôÙconôÙstruct sufôÙfiôÙcient geoôÙmetôÙric deôÙtails in dense mapôÙping when only 0.07% depth samôÙples are availôÙable. Since a simôÙple CPU imôÙpleôÙmenôÙtaôÙtion of our method alôÙready runs at 10ã-ã20 fps, we beôÙlieve our method is very faôÙvorôÙable for pracôÙtiôÙcal SLAM sysôÙtems with critôÙiôÙcal comôÙpuôÙtaôÙtional reôÙquireôÙments.

This proôÙject have be pubôÙlished in IROS 2018.

entry.title: Notesô onô stateô deôÙrivaôÙtionô ofô IMUô modelô inô OKVIS
entry.content:
BackôÙground

In OKVIS paôÙper, states are:

The minôÙiôÙmal roôÙbot erôÙror state erôÙror:

We deôÙvive the linôÙearized model of the erôÙror states:

DeôÙrivaôÙtion

TransôÙlaôÙtion

RoôÙtaôÙtion

Letô ,ô igôÙnoreô 

VeôÙlocôÙity

Gyro Bias

AcôÙceleromôÙeôÙter Bias

FiôÙnally, we get:

where

and

RefôÙerôÙence

  1. LeutenegôÙger, S., LyôÙnen, S., Bosse, M., SiegôÙwart, R., & FurôÙgale, P. (2015). Keyframeã-ãbased viôÙsualãinôÙerôÙtial odomôÙeôÙtry usôÙing nonôÙlinôÙear opôÙtiôÙmizaôÙtion. The InôÙterôÙnaôÙtional JourôÙnal of RoôÙbotôÙics ReôÙsearch, 34(3), 314ã-ã334.
  2. SavôÙage, Paul G. ãStrapôÙdown inôÙerôÙtial navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion inôÙteôÙgraôÙtion alôÙgoôÙrithm deôÙsign part 1: AtôÙtiôÙtude alôÙgoôÙrithms.ã JourôÙnal of guidôÙance, conôÙtrol, and dyôÙnamôÙics 21.1 (1998): 19ã-ã28.
  3. SavôÙage, Paul G. ãStrapôÙdown inôÙerôÙtial navôÙiôÙgaôÙtion inôÙteôÙgraôÙtion alôÙgoôÙrithm deôÙsign part 2: VeôÙlocôÙity and poôÙsiôÙtion alôÙgoôÙrithms.ã JourôÙnal of GuidôÙance, ConôÙtrol, and DyôÙnamôÙics 21.2 (1998): 208ã-ã221.
  4. Shin, Eunã-ãHwan, and Naser Elã-ãSheimy. ãAn unôÙscented Kalman filôÙter for inã-ãmoôÙtion alignôÙment of lowã-ãcost IMUs.ã PoôÙsiôÙtion LoôÙcaôÙtion and NavôÙiôÙgaôÙtion SymôÙpoôÙsium, 2004. PLANS 2004. IEEE, 2004.
  5. Sola, Joan. ãQuaterôÙnion kineôÙmatôÙics for the erôÙrorã-ãstate KF.ã LabôÙoôÙraôÙtoire dãôÙAnalyse et dãArôÙchiôÙtecôÙture des SysôÙtemesã-ãCenôÙtre naôÙtional de la recherche sciôÙenôÙtifique (LAASã-ãCNRS), Toulouse, France, Tech. Rep (2012).

entry.title: GuiôÙtar colôÙlecôÙtion, part 1
entry.content:
I visôÙited TomôÙlee MuôÙsic last month. As I picked up the guiôÙtar and sudôÙdenly found that I have alôÙmost forôÙgotôÙten how to play it. Then I reôÙalôÙized that, I have not pracôÙticed it for half a year since I arôÙrived in Hong Kong. Here, I want to show my preôÙviôÙous guiôÙtars.

ElecôÙtric guiôÙtars

First elecôÙtric guiôÙtar

Squier model 0912 StraôÙtoôÙcaster

My first elecôÙtric guiôÙtar was an Squier model 0912 StraôÙtoôÙcaster, which was so popôÙuôÙlar for beôÙginôÙners who wants a Fender StraôÙcoôÙcater but canãt afôÙford it.
At that time, I was a huge fan of Eric ClapôÙton, so I chose a Squier StraôÙtoôÙcaster with black finôÙish, preôÙtendôÙing that I had a ãBlackôÙieã.

Then, I painted my ãBlackôÙieã Squier. Here is a gig with the psyôÙcheôÙdelic Squier:

First Fender guiôÙtar

This is my first Fender TeleôÙcaster made in MexôÙico.
I bought it in TomôÙlee MuôÙsic.

A gig with the teleôÙcaster

More Fender!

This is my Fender StraôÙtoôÙcaster made in Japan.
It is a secôÙond hand guiôÙtar, but it is good conôÙdiôÙtion.
One thing I donãt like is the noise came out of the vinôÙtage sinôÙgleã-ãcoil pickup.
So later I change those 3 pickup with a set of Fender N3 NoisôÙless pickup.

entry.title: GuiôÙtar colôÙlecôÙtion, part 2
entry.content:
ElecôÙtric bass

Squier P bass maded in Japan

Acoustic guiôÙtar

TakemôÙine D26s made in China

TayôÙlor BT2 made in China

TakemôÙine D26s made in China

entry.title: An auôÙtonomous viôÙsionã-ãbased tarôÙget trackôÙing sysôÙtem for UAV
entry.content:
In this proôÙject, an auôÙtonomous viôÙsionã-ãbased trackôÙing sysôÙtem is preôÙsented to track a maôÙneuôÙverôÙing tarôÙget for a roôÙtorôÙcraft unôÙmanned aerôÙial veôÙhiôÙcle (UAV) with an onôÙboard gimôÙbal camôÙera.

The conôÙtriôÙbuôÙtions of the proôÙject are sumôÙmaôÙrized as folôÙlow:

  1. In the case of tarôÙget ocôÙcluôÙsions or loss, the staôÙtus of the tarôÙget, i.e. loss or not, is firstly deôÙtected based on the KCF tracker, and a comôÙpuôÙtaôÙtionôÙally efôÙfiôÙcient reôÙdeôÙtecôÙtion method is preôÙsented. With this scheme, the UAV can track the tarôÙget again when it reã-ãapôÙpears.

  2. An InôÙterôÙactôÙing Multiã-ãModel ExôÙtended Kalman FilôÙterôÙing (IMMã-ãEKF) based tarôÙget state esôÙtiôÙmaôÙtor is preôÙsented to esôÙtiôÙmate states of the maôÙneuôÙverôÙing tarôÙget, and a nonôÙlinôÙear feedôÙback conôÙtrol law is preôÙsented to staôÙbly track movôÙing tarôÙgets.

  3. A comôÙpuôÙtaôÙtionôÙally efôÙfiôÙcient frameôÙwork imôÙpleôÙmented on onôÙboard TK1 comôÙputer is preôÙsented for ground tarôÙget trackôÙing in unôÙstrucôÙtured enôÙviôÙronôÙments.

This proôÙject have be pubôÙlished in IROS 2017.

entry.title: Iconic moôÙments of Eric ClapôÙton
Layla, you've got me on my knees.
Love in vain, Robert JohnôÙson
Babe I'm gonna leave you, Led ZepôÙpelin,
The conôÙfused and desôÙperôÙate juôÙnior year
ThinkôÙing about freshôÙman year in at uniôÙverôÙsity
